# cpu=0 array=128MB stride=8 duration=1s samples=5
# stride  sweet spot: 1200 MHz
# chase   sweet spot: 2000 MHz
# target_MHz	actual_MHz	stride_Mops	stride_MBs	stride_%	chase_Mops	chase_%	compute_Mops	compute_%
800	800	140.0	1120.0	90.0	11.0	88.0	80.0	25.0
1200	1200	150.0	1200.0	96.0	12.0	95.0	120.0	38.0
1600	1600	155.0	1240.0	99.0	12.4	98.0	160.0	50.0
2000	2000	156.0	1248.0	100.0	12.6	100.0	200.0	62.0
#
# How to read:
#   interpretation guide etc.
#
# --- per-freq stats (stride) ---
# freq_MHz  min_Mops  max_Mops  median_Mops  iqr_MOps
# 800	140.1	142.5	141.3	1.20
# 1200	148.0	152.0	150.0	2.00
# 1600	154.0	156.0	155.0	0.80
# 2000	155.5	156.5	156.0	0.50
#
# --- per-freq stats (chase) ---
# freq_MHz  min_Mops  max_Mops  median_Mops  iqr_MOps
# 800	10.8	11.4	11.1	0.30
# 1200	11.6	12.3	12.0	0.40
# 1600	12.2	12.6	12.4	0.20
# 2000	12.5	12.7	12.6	0.10
#
# --- sweet-spot CI ---
# workload  sweet_MHz  low_MHz  high_MHz  method
# stride    1200       1200      1200       bootstrap_1000
# chase     2000       2000      2000       bootstrap_1000
#
# --- sensitivity (stride) ---
# threshold  sweet_spot_MHz
# 0.80	800
# 0.90	1200
# 0.95	1200
# 1.00	—
#
# --- sensitivity (chase) ---
# threshold  sweet_spot_MHz
# 0.80	1600
# 0.95	2000
# 1.00	—
#
# --- plateau ---
# stride   plateau_breakpoint: 2050 MHz  (slope ratio 18.3x, 95% sweet spot 2000 MHz)
# chase    plateau_breakpoint: —  (no plateau; throughput keeps rising with frequency)
#
# --- raw_samples (stride) ---
# freq_MHz  sample_idx  mops
# 800	1	140.5
# 800	2	141.0
# 800	3	140.8
# 1200	1	149.0
# 1200	2	150.5
# 1200	3	149.7
